message.content:
You are implementing Features 1-4 of the CitedBy.ai SaaS project located at "C:/Users/User/Downloads/SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test - Test Copie".

This is a Vite SPA + React 18 project with dark theme Tailwind. DO NOT migrate to Next.js. 

## IMPORTANT RULES
- DO NOT modify services/analyzer.ts, services/criteria.ts, services/generator.ts
- Dark theme: bg-[#1a1d21], border-white/5, rounded-2xl
- Accent palette: gradient purple-500 → violet-600, text-purple-400
- Use Lucide React icons
- Recharts for charts (already in dependencies)
- Service pattern: getApiKey() → Gemini → fallbackSimulation() (see services/eeat/eeat-auditor.ts for reference)

## Feature 1: AI Monitoring Dashboard (NEW PAGE)
Track brand citations on ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini

### Step 1: Create types/ai-monitoring.ts
Create interfaces: MonitoringResult, CitationEntry, EngineResult, CompetitorData, SentimentBreakdown
Put this in "C:/Users/User/Downloads/SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test - Test Copie/types/ai-monitoring.ts"

### Step 2: Create services/ai-monitoring.ts  
Service with Gemini + fallback deterministic simulation.
- Follow the pattern from services/eeat/eeat-auditor.ts (read it first to understand the pattern)
- getApiKey() check, if available use Gemini, otherwise fallback simulation
- Main function: runMonitoringScan(brandName: string, url: string) → MonitoringResult
- Simulation should generate realistic data: citations across 4 engines (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini), sentiment analysis, competitor comparison
Put this in "C:/Users/User/Downloads/SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test - Test Copie/services/ai-monitoring.ts"

### Step 3: Create pages/AiMonitoring.tsx (~600 lines)
Complete monitoring page with:
- Header: brand name + URL + period selector (7j, 30j, 90j)
- 4 KPI cards: Total Citations, Share of Voice, Sentiment, Tendance
- Chart citations/time (Recharts AreaChart) 
- Distribution by AI engine (BarChart horizontal)
- Table of recent citations (Engine, Query, Position, Date, Sentiment)
- Competitor comparison section
- Cost: 5 Gas per scan (use onDeductCredits(5) prop pattern)
- Props: same pattern as other pages (onNavigate, onDeductCredits, etc.)
Put this in "C:/Users/User/Downloads/SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test - Test Copie/pages/AiMonitoring.tsx"

### Step 4: Integrate into App.tsx and GenerativeTools.tsx
Read App.tsx first to understand the pattern, then:
- Add 'ai-monitoring' to the union type of currentView
- Add lazy import: const AiMonitoring = React.lazy(() => import('./pages/AiMonitoring'))
- Add route case in the main switch/if block
- Add sidebar NavItem in PRINCIPAL section (between Dashboard and Monitoring AEO)
- Use Lucide icon (e.g., Activity or Radar)
- Add breadcrumb entry
- Also modify pages/GenerativeTools.tsx to add a card for "Monitoring IA" (cyan color theme, use Activity or Radar icon)

IMPORTANT: Read each file before modifying it. Use the Edit tool for modifications, Write tool only for new files.
